2010 Mercedes-Benz E350 Cabriolet - V6 Petrol - Automatic 7G-TRONIC
Elegant and increasingly rare Mercedes-Benz E-Class Cabriolet finished in black with beige leather interior - a classic and highly desirable Mercedes configuration.
This is a low-mileage example with only 125,000 km, used primarily for leisure driving and carefully maintained. The smooth V6 gasoline engine combined with the 7-speed automatic transmission delivers refined and comfortable performance, ideal for Algarve coastal driving or long touring journeys.
Mechanical Condition & Maintenance
The vehicle has recently received preventative maintenance to ensure reliability and peace of mind:
New radiator installed
New sensors replaced
Cooling system refreshed
New tires fitted June 2024 (approximately 15,000 km driven)
No warning lights or pending maintenance
The car drives exceptionally smoothly and requires no immediate investment.
Interior & Technology
Beige leather interior in excellent condition
Automatic 7G-TRONIC (7-speed) transmission
Premium Harman Kardon Logic7 surround sound system
AIRSCARF neck-heating system (comfortable open-top driving year-round)
Modern Apple CarPlay touchscreen upgrade
Bluetooth, navigation and media connectivity
Dual-zone climate control
Multifunction steering wheel
Electric convertible roof operating perfectly
Highlights
Rare gasoline V6 (most examples in Portugal are diesel)
Very low mileage for year
Recent maintenance completed
Nearly new tires
Algarve lifestyle vehicle
Ready to enjoy with no immediate expenses
Available for viewing in the Algarve and Lisbon.
Serious inquiries welcome. Negotiation only after viewing.

Título: Audi A3 sportback 2006 – 167624km – Particular – Semi novo
​Descrição:
Vendo Audi A3 Sportback em excelente estado de conservação, ideal para quem procura um carro económico,fiável,familiar.
Ano: 02/2006
KMs: 167624 km
Combustível: Gasolina.
Destaques: Mecânica: correias de distribuição, 4 belas, 2 bobines de ignição, kit de distribuição de acessórios, bomba de água, bateria tudo trocado aos 155000 +/- com fatura a comprovar.
Ultima revisão de óleo e filtro feitas ao 167000km.
Com fatura a comprovar.

​O carro foi sempre bem cuidado, com as revisões feitas atempadamente .Pneus traseiros novos, dianteiros precisam ser trocados.
Exterior com algumas marcas de uso, mas num estado bastante aceitável, bancos e componentes plásticos em bom estado, de referir que tem o forro do teto descolado.
​Motivo da venda: Compra de carro novo.
